professional_summary: Motivated and detail-oriented Junior Web Developer with strong skills in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React.js. Passionate about building responsive, user-friendly web applications that deliver excellent user experiences. Adept at problem-solving, debugging, and writing clean, maintainable code. Committed to continuous learning and contributing effectively to dynamic development teams.

experience.details: For your participation and achievements in Flexisaf Internship Program (FIP) during the September to December2025 chohor -Frontend Developmet Pathway. Your passion for learning and working did not go unnoticed and we hope it inspires you to make a lifr-long positive impact!

projects.title: Safety & Accident Prevention Alert App
projects.description: Developed a cross-platform mobile application using Cordova to help with real-time incident reporting and safety alerts.
